comment: External Claude Code marketplaces + recommended plugins. Re-run install script to sync new marketplace entries.

recommended_plugins.name: clangd-lsp
recommended_plugins.description: C/C++ LSP -- requires clangd installed (winget install LLVM.LLVM)

recommended_plugins.name: pyright-lsp
recommended_plugins.description: Python LSP type checking -- requires: npm install -g pyright

recommended_plugins.name: code-review
recommended_plugins.description: Automated PR review via /code-review -- multi-agent with confidence scoring

recommended_plugins.name: hookify
recommended_plugins.description: Create hooks from markdown files without editing JSON

recommended_plugins.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
recommended_plugins.description: Chrome DevTools MCP -- browser automation, performance traces, a11y, network inspection

recommended_plugins.name: plugin-dev
recommended_plugins.description: Toolkit for authoring Claude Code plugins (marketplace maintainer essential)

recommended_plugins.name: claude-md-management
recommended_plugins.description: Maintain and improve CLAUDE.md memory files across projects

recommended_plugins.name: playwright
recommended_plugins.description: Playwright browser automation -- E2E testing for React/SvelteKit frontends

recommended_plugins.name: sentry
recommended_plugins.description: Sentry error monitoring -- read issues/releases from backend without leaving Claude

recommended_plugins.name: context7
recommended_plugins.description: Version-specific docs lookup from source (Rust crates, React libs, etc.)

recommended_plugins.name: frontend-design
recommended_plugins.description: Production-grade UI generation -- design-system-aware frontend scaffolding

recommended_plugins.name: superpowers
recommended_plugins.description: 14 methodology skills (obra/superpowers): brainstorming, TDD, systematic debugging, plan writing/execution, verification, code review, parallel agents

mcp_servers.name: svelte
mcp_servers.install: claude mcp add --scope user --transport http svelte https://mcp.svelte.dev/mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official Svelte/SvelteKit MCP server -- Svelte 5 runes, SvelteKit data flow, docs lookup

reference_repos.description: Curated list of skills, hooks, slash-commands, agent orchestrators
Multi-agent orchestration patterns for Claude Code
